parameters.query: SELECT id FROM source_items WHERE content_hash = $1 LIMIT 1

value.author: ={{ $('Evaluate Duplicate').first().json.author }}
value.metadata: ={{ JSON.stringify({ sourceName: $('Evaluate Duplicate').first().json.sourceName, sourceTier: $('Evaluate Duplicate').first().json.sourceTier, sourceTags: $('Evaluate Duplicate').first().json.sourceTags, title: $('Evaluate Duplicate').first().json.title }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE source_health
SET 
  last_success_at = NOW(),
  consecutive_failures = 0,
  status = 'healthy',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE source_url = $1
